caption.identify: Which object is being referred to by the phrase "{entity_hint}"?

caption.attribute: How would you describe the {attribute_name} of {entity_hint}?

caption.description: Provide one short visual description for {entity_hint}.

caption.dense_description: Write a detailed visual description of {entity_hint}.

existence: Is there any {category_name} anywhere in this ERP panorama?
Does the full 360 scene contain a {category_name}?

counting: How many {category_name} are visible in the full ERP panorama?

grounding.full: Locate {entity_ref} in the panorama using a normalized box and BFOV [yaw, pitch, x_fov, y_fov].
Give the 0-1000 ERP box and BFOV of {entity_ref}.

Return the normalized 0-1000 bounding box and BFOV for {entity_ref}.
Mark the location of {entity_ref} with a normalized ERP box and BFOV.
grounding.bbox_only: Return only the normalized 0-1000 bounding box of {entity_ref}.

Mark {entity_ref} using only a normalized ERP box.
grounding.angles_only: Return only the BFOV [yaw, pitch, x_fov, y_fov] of {entity_ref}.
Report only the precise BFOV of {entity_ref}.
Give the exact BFOV of {entity_ref} in the ERP image.
Provide only the angular BFOV location of {entity_ref}.
direct_direction.precise: What is the exact BFOV [yaw, pitch, x_fov, y_fov] of {entity_ref} in the ERP image?

direct_direction.cardinal: Which 8-way panorama direction does {entity_ref} lie in relative to the observer?
Is {entity_ref} mainly front, front-right, right, back-right, back, back-left, left, or front-left?
Which coarse 8-way direction best matches the position of {entity_ref}?
In broad panorama terms, where is {entity_ref} located around the observer?
relative_direction: On the 360 panorama ring, where is {target_ref} relative to {reference_ref}: right, back-right, opposite, back-left, or left?
Compared with {reference_ref}, which panoramic ring sector contains {target_ref}: right, back-right, opposite, back-left, or left?
On the horizontal panorama circle, where does {target_ref} lie relative to {reference_ref}?
If {reference_ref} is used as the angular reference on the panoramic ring, is {target_ref} to the right, back-right, opposite, back-left, or left?
Which panoramic angular relation best describes {target_ref} with respect to {reference_ref}?
On the ERP horizontal ring around the observer, where is {target_ref} compared with {reference_ref}?
Using {reference_ref} as the reference target on the panorama ring, which side-sector best matches {target_ref}?
How is {target_ref} distributed around the 360 panorama ring relative to {reference_ref}?
view_transform.camera_rotation_transform: If you rotate your view by {turn_angle_deg}° to the {rotation_direction}, where would {entity_ref} appear: right, back-right, behind, back-left, or left?
After turning {turn_angle_deg}° to the {rotation_direction}, where is {entity_ref} in the reoriented view?
Suppose the observer rotates {turn_angle_deg}° to the {rotation_direction}. Which direction best matches {entity_ref}: right, back-right, behind, back-left, or left?
Once the viewing direction is rotated {turn_angle_deg}° to the {rotation_direction}, where should {entity_ref} appear?
In the new view after a {turn_angle_deg}° {rotation_direction} turn, is {entity_ref} on the right, back-right, behind, back-left, or left?
view_transform.object_conditioned_reorie: If you turn to face {facing_ref}, where would {target_ref} appear: right, back-right, behind, back-left, or left?

Use {facing_ref} as the new forward direction. Where does {target_ref} lie: right, back-right, behind, back-left, or left?
If {facing_ref} is treated as the new front of the panorama, where would {target_ref} appear?
Once you face {facing_ref}, is {target_ref} to your right, back-right, behind, back-left, or left?

Out of {candidate_list}, which object lies closest to the {reference_label} in 3D space?

Among the candidates {candidate_list}, which one is nearest to the {reference_label}?
Which option is closest to the {reference_label} when comparing 3D center distances: {candidate_list}?
distance_estimation.observer_choice: Which of these objects ({candidate_list}) is closest to the observer in this panorama?

relative_3d_position.open: From the current camera viewpoint, what is the 3D relation of {entity_a} relative to {entity_b}?

Which description best matches the camera-centered 3D position of {entity_a} relative to {entity_b}?

From the camera viewpoint, is {entity_a} left of, right of, above, below, in front of, or behind {entity_b}?

relative_3d_position.choice: Which option best describes the camera-centered 3D position of {entity_a} relative to {entity_b}: {choice_list}?

seam_continuity.nearest_neighbor: Which listed object is actually nearest to {target_ref} near the {target_side} image edge: {choice_list}?
